title: Immersive Interfaces - Easy Magic
description: This texture pack provides compatibility with Easy Magic, seamlessly integrating its grooves into the aesthetic style of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack provides compatibility with Easy Magic, seamlessly integrating its grooves into the aesthetic style of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f888c0ac35b892d7088bd5cf8918ee2445e4279d.png) ### After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b167df83be0912c84f69d656a190f022420fa1b5.png)
